hyperedges.label: Client HTML Shell (root mount + entry + Leaflet CSS)

nodes.label: Registration Dashboard Objective
nodes.rationale: Track and visualize registration data for Midwest 3on3 leagues (surveys); primary outcome is accurate daily registration reports with day/week/month breakdowns.

nodes.label: Throttled Data Sync with Progress Bar
nodes.rationale: Aggregate data SLOWLY to respect API rate limits; sync taking up to 1 hour is acceptable as long as it is reliable. A visual progress bar must be shown during sync.
nodes.norm_label: throttled data sync with progress bar

nodes.label: Daily Registration Reporting
nodes.rationale: Reports must allow filtering/grouping by league (survey) name; leagues are internally referred to as surveys.

nodes.label: Registration Charts (Bar and Line)
nodes.rationale: Charts added incrementally after core sync completes; must show Total Registrations and breakdowns by Registration Name (league/survey) per day.

nodes.label: Convex HTTP Endpoints (httpAction)
nodes.rationale: HTTP endpoints live in convex/http.ts, require the httpAction decorator, and register at the exact path given.

nodes.label: Convex Validators (v.*)
nodes.rationale: Every Convex function must include argument validators; undefined is not a valid Convex value, use null; arrays capped at 8192 values, objects at 1024 entries, 1MB size limits.

nodes.label: Convex Function Registration (public vs internal)
nodes.rationale: query/mutation/action expose functions to the public internet; internalQuery/internalMutation/internalAction keep sensitive logic private and callable only by other Convex functions.

nodes.label: Convex Function References (api / internal objects)
nodes.rationale: File-based routing: a public function f in convex/example.ts is api.example.f; ctx.runQuery/runMutation/runAction take a FunctionReference, never the function itself.

nodes.label: Convex Pagination (paginationOptsValidator)
nodes.rationale: Queries ending in .paginate() return page, isDone, continueCursor; preferred over .collect() to bound reads.

nodes.label: Convex Schema Guidelines
nodes.rationale: Schema lives in convex/schema.ts; index names must list all fields (by_field1_and_field2); avoid unbounded arrays in documents (1MB limit, full rewrites) — use child tables with foreign keys; separate high-churn data from stable profile data to reduce write contention.

nodes.label: Convex Authentication (auth.config.ts, getUserIdentity)
nodes.rationale: JWT auth requires convex/auth.config.ts or getUserIdentity() always returns null; prefer identity.tokenIdentifier over identity.subject for auth-linked lookups; never accept userId as an argument for authorization; use ConvexProviderWithAuth on the client.

nodes.label: Convex Query Guidelines (withIndex, bounded reads)
nodes.rationale: Never use .filter — define indexes and use withIndex; prefer .take()/pagination over .collect(); no built-in count — maintain denormalized counters; batch deletes with .take(n) and scheduler self-rescheduling to stay within transaction limits.

nodes.label: Convex Mutation Guidelines (replace vs patch)
nodes.rationale: ctx.db.replace fully replaces a document; ctx.db.patch shallow-merges; both throw if the document does not exist. Mutations are transactions — minimize action-to-mutation calls to avoid race conditions.

nodes.label: Convex Action Guidelines (use node, no ctx.db)
nodes.rationale: "use node" only in action-only files needing Node built-ins; fetch() works in the default runtime; actions never touch ctx.db.
nodes.norm_label: convex action guidelines (use node, no ctx.db)

nodes.label: Convex Cron Guidelines (crons.interval/cron)
nodes.rationale: Only crons.interval or crons.cron (not hourly/daily/weekly helpers); pass FunctionReferences; export the crons object as default from convex/crons.ts.

nodes.label: Convex Testing (convex-test + vitest edge-runtime)
nodes.rationale: Use convex-test with vitest and @edge-runtime/vm; pass a module map from import.meta.glob so convex-test can discover function files.

nodes.label: Convex File Storage (_storage system table, Blobs)
nodes.rationale: Use ctx.storage.getUrl() for signed URLs; query the _storage system table for metadata instead of the deprecated getMetadata; storage items are Blobs.
nodes.norm_label: convex file storage (_storage system table, blobs)
